slogans: Dig deep. You have more in the tank.
This is where fitness pays off.
Stay strong. The finish line is near.
Push past the wall. You're stronger.
Fatigue is temporary. Victory is forever.
Stay focused. Fatigue is mental too.
Push through the pain. You're a warrior.
Find your strength. It's still there.
Stay determined. Fatigue can't stop you.
Push your limits. Find your greatness.
